changes: vehicles.json rebate field synced to promotions.json as single source of truth
Monthly estimates now show both 10% down (emerald) and 0% down (amber) on main website
Full Lineup table column order: Model → Range → OTR Price → Rebate → 10% → 0%
OTR header renamed to 'OTR Price' for clarity
(2026) suffix removed from Atto 3 variant names
Pricelist page: Price Breakdown colspan corrected, overflow-x-auto for scrollable table
Responsive alignment fixes for mobile: whitespace-nowrap on all monetary values
Pricing model verified — all monthly calculations confirmed on /vehicles page using promotions.json (rebate only, no CSP/GSP)
Monthly display: 0% Down + 10% Down for every variant, flat rate 2.30%, 9 years
Rebate-only pricing confirmed across all 6 models (10 variants)
Data pipeline documented: edit promotions.json → build → deploy → main website auto-updates
Charging rate database restructured with configurable charging profiles — rates no longer hardcoded in components
8 charging profiles added: Home (RM0.30/kWh), Public DC Fast Charging (RM1.40/kWh default), plus future-ready operator slots
Charging Time Estimator now reads all rates from charging.json — AC uses home profile, DC uses public_default (RM1.40/kWh)
DC charging cost simplified to single rate (RM1.40/kWh) — no range display or operator dropdown
Prompt Generator reads home charging rate from profile instead of hardcoded RM0.30
Disclaimer added to /charging page: 'Public charging fees vary between charging networks and locations'
Charging schema updated to validate new chargingProfiles structure
Dedicated promotions.json — single source of truth for monthly-changing rebates, CSP/GSP/SSP & freebies
July 2026 promo live: Atto 2 RM11k, Atto 3 RM10k (+6yr service pkg), Seal RM3k, Sealion 7 RM7k, M6 RM4k, Seal 6 RM1k
Promotion system: all components read from promotions.json instead of vehicles.json for rebates
CSP replacement support — Atto 3 gets 6-Year Service Package (RM3,888) instead of cash rebate
Published on /data page as machine-readable JSON for external agents
Clean SEB references from rebate data (rebates are dealer discounts, not electricity subsidies)
EV Market Malaysia hub launched — live news feed for EV industry updates, pricing & rebate changes
EV comparison tool — side-by-side BYD vs competitor comparison with auto-suggest
7 competitor brands added: Proton e.MAS, Chery, MG, Leapmotor, Jaecoo, Jetour, Tesla (36 variants total)
All competitor specs researched and verified from Paul Tan, SoyaCincau, AutoBuzz & official sources
NEDC ranges added for all BYD models (official BYD Malaysia data)
East Malaysia pricing markup tracked (Proton +RM3k confirmed, Jaecoo +RM2,750 confirmed, Tesla national pricing)
Monthly payment estimator with 2.30% flat rate, 9yr, 10% down — includes EM markup & insurance estimate
Insurance estimate tiers: RM2.3k (<RM100k), RM3k (RM100-150k), RM3.5k (RM150-200k), RM4k (>RM200k)
BYD advantages section — Blade Battery, 6+8 yr warranty, V2L standard, World #1 EV maker
Live-data badge, category filters, market highlights, and mobile-optimised layout
Font optimised for screen readability (system-ui stack, subpixel antialiasing, max contrast)
24 EV news items with source links from Malaysia's top automotive publications
RJEOS editorial campaign engine launched with constitution, design directions, creative package builder
Dashboard restructuring — Finance Calc, Charging, Warranty moved to standalone pages
Vehicle DB mobile compact view with search filter and expandable specs
Finance Calculator compact redesign for iPhone 16 (tighter padding, toggle switches)

Added OEM Social design direction in RJEOS (clean, bright, family-oriented artwork)
